name: Good Time Golf
about: Good Time Golf is an indoor golf simulator lounge located in Assembly Row, Somerville, MA. The facility offers year-round access to six golf bays equipped with state-of-the-art Uneekor launch monitors and Swing Optix technology for detailed swing analysis. The venue features a full bar, a curated food menu, and a social atmosphere suitable for practice, casual play, group events, and corporate gatherings. Memberships provide significant savings on simulator rentals and lessons.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Uneekor Swing Optix technology provides comprehensive swing analysis
Full bar and chef-curated food menu enhance the golf and social experience
80% discount on simulator rentals for members offers exceptional value
Flexible booking for casual outings, parties, and corporate events

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-curated menu with shareable bites, small plates, and options for various dietary preferences
Full-service bar with local craft beers, signature cocktails, and non-alcoholic options

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual high-speed camera launch monitor providing complete swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available at the facility for your convenience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue offers a full bar and curated food menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage and pace of play; detailed information can be provided during booking.

faq.question: Is Good Time Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the simulators are suitable for all ages, though children under 16 must be accompanied by an adult.
